scripts.predev: node -e "const n=require('net');const s=n.createServer();s.once('error',()=>{const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{const r=execSync('netstat -ano').toString();const m=r.match(/TCP\s+[^:]+:5173\s+\S+\s+LISTENING\s+(\d+)/);if(m){execSync('taskkill /F /PID '+m[1]);console.log('Killed PID '+m[1]+' on port 5173');}}catch(e){}});s.once('listening',()=>s.close());s.listen(5173);"
